C0900A_RCLL_CRNTL_SEASN_CD C0900A Memory/Recall - Current Season (3-day Asmt Prd) - The data in this column indentifies whether or not the patient was able to recall the current season during the three-day assessment period. CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies whether or not the patient was able to recall the current season during the three-day assessment period. 0 = No
1 = Yes
289 C0900B_RCLL_LCTN_ROOM_CD C0900B_RCLL_LCTN_ROOM_CD C0900B Memory/Recall - Loc Of Own Room (3-day Asmt Prd) -
